evidence: "Keeps you wondering until the last 20 minutes or so what he's up against and then it gets better."
"It is well acted and very realistic."
"Standard Asian special effects but well done."
"Great twist at the end. Totally engaging movie."
"Love the music at the end and wish I had caught the name of the performer and song in the credits."
"Glad I watched it. Holmes solves his own mystery with a sweet, heartwarming core to the story."
"Her visits were always welcomed and appreciated."

summary: The user enjoys a variety of genres, particularly horror, sci-fi, and documentaries, with a strong preference for fast-paced narratives. They appreciate engaging stories with emotional depth and sensory experiences, while showing less loyalty to specific creators.
